Profile.Name: zoraxy-crowdsec-bouncer
Profile.Description:
Zoraxy reverse proxy with the CrowdSec Bouncer plugin pre-installed. Automatically blocks malicious IPs using your CrowdSec instance. The config.yaml is created automatically on first start using the environment variables.
Credits: - Zoraxy by tobychui (AGPL v3): https://github.com/tobychui/zoraxy - zoraxy_crowdsec_bouncer by AnthonyMichaelTDM (MIT): https://github.com/AnthonyMichaelTDM/zoraxy_crowdsec_bouncer
